name: @mulmoclaude/skill-bridge
description: Skill stagingâ†’active mirror rule for MulmoClaude and MulmoTerminal. The agent writes skill drafts under data/skills/<slug>/ (no .claude/ permission gate); this mirrors the allowlist (SKILL.md, schema.json, templates/<safe path>) into .claude/skills/<slug>/. Pure rule + fs ops, parameterized by workspaceRoot. Server-only; no Vue.
